text:
Created attachment 164888
rubygem-hieracles-0.3.2.diff

This update mostly is targeted at making hieracles more consumable as a third party lib.

- added some relevance to the registry class
- changed the internal way to store the nodes information
- moved Config singleton to a proper class for modularity sake

https://github.com/Gandi/hieracles/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md


cheers,
mose
